---
name: Refactor
about: Improve code structure without changing behavior
title: "[Refactor] "
labels: refactor
assignees: ""
---

## Description
Describe the part of the system that needs refactoring.

## Reason
Why refactoring is required.

Examples:
- Improve readability
- Reduce duplication
- Follow clean architecture
- Improve maintainability

## Current Implementation
Describe the current code structure.

## Proposed Improvement
Explain the planned refactor.

Example:
- Extract service layer
- Separate repository
- Simplify logic

## Risks
Potential risks during refactoring.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Code structure improved
- [ ] No functional changes
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Code reviewed

## Tasks

- [ ] Identify refactor scope
- [ ] Implement refactor
- [ ] Update tests
- [ ] Verify functionality
